instruction: Provide a detailed summary of the CVE.
input: SAP Business Warehouse, versions 700, 701, 702, 711, 730, 731, 740, 750, 782 and SAP BW/4HANA, versions 100, 200, allow a low privileged attacker to inject code using a remote enabled function module over the network. Via the function module an attacker can create a malicious ABAP report which could be used to get access to sensitive data, to inject malicious UPDATE statements that could have also impact on the operating system, to disrupt the functionality of the SAP system which can thereby lead to a Denial of Service.
output: SAP Business Warehouse (BW) and SAP BW/4HANA, across various versions, have a vulnerability where a low-privileged attacker can inject code via a remote-enabled function module. This allows for the creation of malicious ABAP reports to access sensitive data, execute unauthorized UPDATE statements affecting the operating system, and potentially cause a Denial of Service (DoS).
